positive: A highly detailed, centered, minimalist silhouette design of a fox and a celestial constellation. The fox is stylized and graceful, intertwined with abstract geometric representations of stars and moon phases. Use a limited palette of deep indigo, cosmic gold, and matte black. The composition should be circular and balanced, suitable for printing on a dark t-shirt. Art style: clean graphic illustration, linocut style with digital polish, high contrast, symmetrical composition. Focus on strong outlines and crisp edges. Isolated on a solid background for clear transfer.
negative: blur, noise, grainy, text, watermark, low resolution, artifact, ugly, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, cluttered, photographic, realistic, logos, trademarks
